query:
ALTER TABLE users 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS password_hash VARCHAR(255) AFTER phone,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS open_id VARCHAR(255) AFTER profile_photo,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS login_method VARCHAR(50) AFTER open_id,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS last_signed_in TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER login_method,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AFTER last_signed_in,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AFTER created_at;

ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS login_method VARCHAR(50) AFTER open_id,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS last_signed_in TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER login_method,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AFTER last_signed_in,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AFTER created_at;
